title: Windchill: REST Services
description: Connect and manipulate data sent to and from Windchill. Prototype multiple types of REST requests for a process-based use case and analyze the responses.

modules.title: Anatomy of WRS
modules.description: Compare the characteristics of RESTful APIs to Windchill REST Services. Understand domains, metadata, structural and navigation properties, OData URL components, and HTTP methods.

modules.title: Access Windchill Objects
modules.description: Use the WRS API Catalog and Postman to prototype basic REST requests. Apply query parameters to refine results and interpret HTTP responses.

modules.title: Build and Execute REST Requests
modules.description: Secure requests with nonce tokens, retrieve part structures and process plans, change life cycle states, and visualize JSON responses.

modules.title: Advanced Requests and Customization
modules.description: Create multiple objects in a single request, extend and create custom WRS domains, and implement OAuth2 authentication for end-user applications.
